testcase.name: test_warmed_multichip_trace_performance[blackhole-1x4-ring]

failure.message: RuntimeError: TT_FATAL @ /home/mvasiljevic/tt-metal/ttnn/cpp/ttnn/operations/matmul/device/matmul_device_operation.cpp:224: bbox.contains(shard_grid) info:
